name: patient-chart-block
title: Patient Chart
description: A single-patient clinical face sheet — a PatientSummaryPanel hero over deep-dive vitals, medications, problems, allergies, labs, and encounter sections, in a DashboardShell + DashboardGrid.
clinicalNotes: The flagship read-view: a curated summary hero pins identity + allergies at the top (sticky-header pattern) while the deep-dive panels below carry the full record. Redundancy between the summary snapshot and the detailed panels is intentional and matches real EHRs — the 5-second read and the full section coexist. Each panel keeps its own clinical semantics (status tones, reference ranges, sort order); the block only owns layout. Pass each panel its own props object so your data wiring stays local to the panel it feeds.
notes: Layer-M3 block (B-1) — the freemium flagship. Client component. Composes 7 M2 panels.
